When introducing new processor code, the Evolver must also provide a smoke test confirming that the processor instantiates and runs on synthetic input without raising exceptions. The builder algebra guarantees type-safety (every candidate satisfies hook-type contracts and processor-composition rules) but not behavioral safety; an edit that type-checks may still produce non-local behavioral effects, detectable only by the Critic and gating layer. Evolver：在给定 Planner 的适配局面的情况下，Evolver 生成一个或多个候选 harnesses {H~tk}k=1Kt ，每个候选都被定义为对当前 harness Ht 的带类型构建器操作。每个候选都携带变更清单（change mannifest）：被编辑的组件、预期的行为效果，以及预计会改进或回归的任务。当引入新的处理器代码时，Evolver 还必须提供一个冒烟测试，用于确认该处理器会在合成输入上实例化并运行，且不会抛出异常。构建器代数保证类型安全（每个候选都满足 hook-type 合约与处理器组合规则），但不保证行为安全；即使某个编辑能通过类型检查，它仍可能产生非局部的行为影响，这只能由 Critic 与门控层检测出来。

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              Critic and gating. The Critic defends against reward hacking; the deterministic gating layer defends against catastrophic forgetting. The Critic evaluates each candidate by comparing its change manifest against trace evidence and assessing whether edits risk non-local effects through shared state or control flow. When gaps are detected, it issues a single revision request to the Evolver. After at most one revision cycle, the Critic returns either no_op or an ordered ship_ranking. The deterministic gate then applies acceptance checks in sequence: manifest completeness, configuration normalization (ensuring the candidate is in canonical form), build or smoke tests (when applicable), and the seesaw constraint (regression check on previously passing tasks; Section 4.1). The first failing check halts the sequence; passing candidates are committed and failing ones archived with their rejection reason. This decouples LLM judgment from acceptance: regardless of the Critic's recommendation, only deterministic checks govern shipping. 评审与门控。评审用于防止奖励投机；确定性门控层用于防止灾难性遗忘。评审通过将每个候选的变更清单与追踪证据进行对照，并评估所作修改是否会通过共享状态或控制流带来非局部影响，从而对每个候选进行评估。若发现缺口，则向演化器发出一次性的修订请求。至多一个修订周期后，评审返回 no_op 或一个有序的 ship_ranking。随后，确定性门按顺序执行接收检查：变更清单的完整性、配置规范化（确保候选处于规范形式）、构建或冒烟测试（如适用），以及跷跷板约束（对先前已通过的任务进行回归检查；第4.1节）。一旦某项检查失败即中止流程；通过的候选将被提交，失败的则归档并附上被拒原因。这样就将 LLM 的判断与接收流程解耦：无论评审的建议为何，只有确定性检查才能决定是否发版。

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              Design principle. Language-model subagents explore, hypothesize, and propose; typed structure and deterministic gates determine what ships. This separation ensures that safety properties (no regression, no unaudited edits) hold regardless of LLM subagent failure modes. 设计原则。语言模型子智能体负责探索、提出假设并给出方案；类型化结构与确定性门控决定最终发版内容。这样的分离确保安全性质（不回归、不未经审计的修改）在无论语言模型子智能体的失败模式如何时都能成立。

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              4.4 The Adaptation Loop

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              4.4 适应循环

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              Algorithm 1 formalizes the adaptation loop (each iteration corresponds to one "round" in Section 6). Starting from an initial harness H0 ,each iteration executes the current harness on an adaptation batch and selectively invokes the four stages: the Digester, Planner, and Evolver each gate on a continuation condition (sufficient actionability, non-empty landscape, and at least one type-safe candidate, respectively), while the Critic and deterministic gate are mandatory for any candidate that reaches them. A round commits a new harness only when a candidate clears all acceptance checks. 算法 1 将适应循环形式化（每次迭代对应第 6 节中的一个“轮次”）。从初始 harness H0 开始，每次迭代都在一个适应批次上运行当前 harness，并有选择地调用四个阶段：Digester、Planner 和 Evolver 各自由一个继续条件把关（分别是足够的可操作性、非空的 landscape，以及至少一个类型安全的候选项），而 Critic 和确定性 gate 对任何到达它们的候选项都是必经的。只有当某个候选项通过所有接纳检查时，一个轮次才会提交新的 harness。

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              4.5 Variant Isolation via Ensemble Routing

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              4.5 通过集成路由实现变体隔离

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              The adaptation loop (Section 4.4) maintains a single harness Ht . When tasks require conflicting behaviors,an edit that improves one subset may regress another; the seesaw constraint rejects it, protecting stability but discarding a locally beneficial change. Variant isolation lifts this limitation by maintaining up to K harness variants {Ht(1),…,Ht(Vt)}(Vt≤K) and routing each task to the variant with the highest estimated success rate on that task's cluster across prior rounds. We term this mechanism Ensemble routing. 适应循环（第 4.4 节）维护单一的 harness Ht。当任务需要相互冲突的行为时，改进某一子集的编辑可能会使另一部分退化；摆锤约束会拒绝它，既保护了稳定性，也舍弃了局部有益的更改。变体隔离通过最多维护 K 个 harness 变体 {Ht(1),…,Ht(Vt)}(Vt≤K) 并将每个任务路由到在该任务簇上、基于先前轮次估计成功率最高的变体，从而突破这一限制。我们将这一机制称为集成路由。

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              The gating layer distinguishes two outcomes per candidate: (1) the edit improves some tasks without regressing any, in which case it is applied to its target variant; or (2) it improves a subset while regressing others, in which case the system forks a new variant rather than rejecting the edit outright (retiring the lowest-performing variant if the pool is full). Once multiple variants exist, the seesaw constraint is scoped per-variant: a candidate targeting variant k is tested only against tasks routed to k ,so improvements to one cluster cannot regress another. This design predicts three properties validated in Section 6.3: (1) non-degrading aggregate trajectory (peak = final), (2) sustained exploration across more rounds, and (3) lower total token consumption. 门控层会为每个候选编辑区分两种结果：(1) 该编辑在不使任何任务退化的情况下改进了部分任务，此时将其应用于目标变体；或 (2) 它改进了某个子集，同时使其他任务退化，此时系统会创建一个新的变体，而不是直接拒绝该编辑（若池已满，则退役表现最差的变体）。一旦存在多个变体，摆锤约束就按变体分别适用：针对变体 k 的候选项只会在路由到 k 的任务上进行测试，因此对一个簇的改进不会使另一个簇退化。该设计预测了第 6.3 节验证的三个特性：(1) 总体轨迹不退化（峰值 = 最终值），(2) 在更多轮次中持续探索，以及 (3) 更低的总 token 消耗。

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              5 Harness-Model Co-Evolution

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              5 Harness-Model 协同进化

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              Sections 3 and 4 show that evolving the harness alone, with the foundation model held fixed, already delivers substantial gains, and that these gains are largest for weaker, smaller task agents, whose behavioral gaps a better harness most readily closes. Co-evolution does not displace that route; it extends it along a second axis. For a capability-limited small model, harness evolution eventually meets a scaffolding ceiling: once the harness exposes the right tools, context, and control flow, the binding constraint becomes whether the frozen model can actually exploit them, and no harness edit can supply reasoning capacity the model itself lacks. 第 3 和 4 节表明，仅仅在基础模型保持不变的情况下进化 harness，已经能带来显著收益，而且这些收益在较弱、更小的任务智能体上最大；更好的 harness 最容易弥合它们的行为差距。协同进化并不取代这条路径；它沿着第二个维度加以拓展。对能力受限的小模型而言，harness 演化最终会触及搭建（scaffolding）的上限：一旦 harness 暴露出正确的工具、上下文和控制流，约束就变成了冻结的模型是否真的能够利用它们——而 harness 的任何修改都无法补足模型自身缺乏的推理能力。

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              Symmetrically, training the model under a fixed harness meets a training-signal ceiling: newly acquired capabilities go unexercised when the scaffold never surfaces the context, tools, or control flow that elicit them. The model is the agent's cognitive core, supplying reasoning and planning, while the harness is its executive apparatus, determining what the model perceives, what it can invoke, and what constrains its execution. A sharper apparatus cannot compensate for a weak core, nor a stronger core for an apparatus that never calls on it. Co-evolution targets precisely this bottleneck: by training the model within the same loop that evolves its harness, the agent improves along both axes simultaneously, breaking the ceiling that either improvement alone would leave in place. The principle of jointly evolving complementary capability components also appears in other settings: K2 Agent [40] co-evolves know-what (declarative knowledge) and know-how (procedural skill) for hierarchical mobile device control. 对称地，在固定 harness 下训练模型也会触及训练信号上限：当脚手架从未呈现出能触发这些能力所需的上下文、工具或控制流时，新获得的能力就无法被使用。模型是智能体的认知核心，负责推理与规划；而 harness 是它的执行装置，决定模型会感知什么、能够调用什么，以及什么会约束它的执行。更锐利的装置无法弥补薄弱的核心，同样，一个更强的核心也无法弥补永远不去调用它的装置。协同进化正是瞄准这个瓶颈：通过在同一个循环中训练模型、同时演化它的 harness，智能体在两个轴上同步提升，打破单独改进任一方时留下的上限。共同进化互补能力组件的原则也出现在其他场景中：K2 Agent [40] 为层级移动设备控制协同进化了“知道什么”（声明式知识）与“知道怎么做”（程序技能）。

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              Figure 3 illustrates the co-evolution mechanism. Rather than alternating between independent harness-evolution and model-training phases, HarnessX runs both within a single iteration over a shared replay buffer. We formalize the iteration (Section 5.1), describe the two optimization substrates (Section 5.2), specify the model training objective via cross-harness GRPO (Section 5.3), and characterize off-policy training over the shared buffer, the property that lets model RL run at no additional rollout cost (Section 5.4). 图 3 展示协同进化机制。HarnessX 并不是在独立的 harness 演化阶段与模型训练阶段之间交替运行，而是在对共享重放缓冲区的单次迭代中同时完成两者。我们在第 5.1 节形式化该迭代，在第 5.2 节描述两种优化底座；通过跨 harness 的 GRPO（第 5.3 节）给出模型训练目标，并在第 5.4 节刻画在共享缓冲区上的离策略训练——正是这一性质使得模型 RL 能在不增加额外 rollout 成本的情况下运行。

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                               

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              Figure 3 The harness-model co-evolution loop. The agent (Mt,Ht) runs the task batch Bt under a fixed verifier and the observability layer; the resulting traces and rewards (τ,r) enter a shared replay buffer B ,where cross-harness grouping pools trajectories of the same task across harness versions and computes group-relative advantages A^ . The same buffer drives two updates over identical data: AEGIS harness evolution (Digester → Planner → Evolver → Critic,yielding the evolved harness Ht+1 ) and cross-harness GRPO (group sampling and a clipped GRPO objective, yielding the updated model Mt+1 ); both feed the next iteration. 图 3 harness-模型协同进化循环。智能体 (Mt,Ht) 在固定的验证器与可观测性层下运行任务批次 Bt；由此产生的轨迹与奖励 (τ,r) 进入共享重放缓冲区 B。其中，跨 harness 的分组会在不同 harness 版本的同一任务轨迹之间进行聚合，并计算组相对优势 A^。同一个缓冲区驱动两次对相同数据的更新：AEGIS harness 演化（Digester → Planner → Evolver → Critic，得到演化后的 harness Ht+1）以及跨 harness 的 GRPO（按组采样并使用一个裁剪的 GRPO 目标，得到更新后的模型 Mt+1）；两者共同喂给下一次迭代。

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              5.1 The Co-evolution Iteration

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              5.1 协同进化迭代

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              Co-evolution operates over the pair (Mt,Ht) ,where Mt denotes trainable model parameters (relaxing the frozen-model assumption of Section 4) and Ht denotes the harness configuration at iteration t . The system maintains a fixed-capacity replay buffer B with first-in-first-out eviction. Each iteration proceeds as: 协同进化作用于一对 (Mt,Ht)，其中 Mt 表示可训练的模型参数（放宽第 4 节中冻结模型的假设），Ht 表示迭代 t 的工具架构配置。系统维护一个固定容量的回放缓冲区 B，采用先进先出淘汰。每次迭代按以下步骤进行：

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              1. Rollout. Run (Mt,Ht) on the adaptation batch Bt ; the observability layer records each episode as a complete trace τi ,capturing every model turn,tool call,and tool result.

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              2. 推进。对适应批次 Bt 运行 (Mt,Ht)；可观测性层将每个回合记录为完整轨迹 τi，捕获每一次模型交互、工具调用以及工具结果。

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              1. Verification. A fixed verifier scores each trace into a scalar reward ri . Holding the verifier fixed keeps rewards comparable across harness versions, which the cross-harness advantage (Eq. 3) requires.

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              2. 验证。固定的验证器会将每条轨迹评为标量奖励 ri。保持验证器不变能让不同工具架构版本之间的奖励保持可比性，而跨工具架构优势（式 3）所需的正是这一点。

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              1. Buffer insertion. Append each scored trace to the shared buffer B together with the harness version that produced it,so successive rounds accumulate rather than overwrite; FIFO eviction keeps B restricted to recent rounds.

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              2. 缓冲区插入。将每条已评分的轨迹连同产生它的工具架构版本 B 一同追加到共享缓冲区；因此后续轮次会累积而非覆盖；FIFO 淘汰保证 B 只保留最近几轮。

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              1. Harness evolution (Ht+1←AEGIS(Ht,B) ,non-parametric,Section 4). The meta-agent reads the buffered traces as evidence of where the scaffold fails, proposes one discrete structural edit, and admits it only if the Critic and gating layer validate it.

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              2. 工具架构进化 (Ht+1←AEGIS(Ht,B) ，非参数型，见第 4 节）。元智能体读取缓冲区中的轨迹作为脚手架失败位置的证据，提出一次离散的结构编辑，并仅当 Critic 与门控层通过验证时才接纳它。

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              1. Behavior log-probabilities. For the traces just added this round, run a forward pass under the generating model Mt to obtain the token-level log-probabilities πθ old (τi) and cache them for use in the GRPO loss; trajectories from earlier rounds reuse the values cached at their own insertion (Section 5.4).

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              2. 行为对数概率。针对本轮刚加入的那些轨迹，在生成模型 Mt 下做一次前向计算，得到令牌级对数概率 πθ old (τi)，并缓存以用于 GRPO 损失；来自更早轮次的轨迹则重用其各自插入时缓存的值（第 5.4 节）。

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              1. GRPO update (Mt+1←GRPO(Mt,B) ,parametric,Section 5.3). Partition traces into per-task groups spanning harness versions, assign each a group-relative advantage, and take a clipped policy-gradient step with a KL anchor to the fixed reference.

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              2. GRPO 更新 (Mt+1←GRPO(Mt,B) ，参数型，见第 5.3 节）。把轨迹按跨越不同工具架构版本的每个任务分组，为每组分配组相对优势，并带 KL 锚定到固定参考，执行一步截断的策略梯度更新。

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              1. Advance. Return to step 1 with the evolved pair (Mt+1,Ht+1) .

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              2. 前进。用已进化的一对 (Mt+1,Ht+1) 回到步骤 1。

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              Every trace serves as both AEGIS diagnostic evidence and GRPO training signal. The harness evolution (step 4) and model update (steps 5-6) read the same buffer but neither conditions on the other's output within the same iteration; both must complete before the next rollout begins. 每条轨迹既是 AEGIS 诊断证据，也是 GRPO 训练信号。工具架构进化（第 4 步）与模型更新（第 5-6 步）读取同一个缓冲区，但在同一迭代内均不基于对方的输出作条件化；两者都必须在下一次推进开始前完成。

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              5.2 Optimization Substrates

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              5.2 优化底座

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              Harness side (non-parametric optimization). Harness evolution proceeds as in Section 4, drawing on the replay buffer B for trace evidence. The principal difference from standalone AEGIS is that B contains trajectories from multiple model checkpoints M0,M1,…,Mt ,exposing the Digester to behavioral variation from both model updates and harness edits. Harness 端（非参数优化）。Harness 的演化沿用第 4 节的方法，借助回放缓冲区 B 来提供轨迹证据。与独立的 AEGIS 的主要区别在于，B 包含来自多个模型检查点 M0,M1,…,Mt 的轨迹，从而使 Digester 能够接触到来自模型更新与 harness 编辑两方面的行为差异。

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              Model side (parametric optimization via GRPO). The key design choice is the cross-harness grouping criterion (formalized in Section 5.3): all trajectories sharing a task identifier form one GRPO group regardless of which harness or model checkpoint produced them, so that within-group variation reflects strategy differences rather than sampling noise alone. 模型端（通过 GRPO 进行参数优化）。关键设计选择是跨 Harness 的分组准则（在第 5.3 节形式化）：所有共享任务标识符的轨迹组成一个 GRPO 组，而不管它们由哪个 harness 或模型检查点生成；因此，组内差异反映的是策略差异，而不仅仅是采样噪声。

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              Complementarity. The harness update makes discrete structural changes (adding a tool, replacing a control processor, restructuring the prompt) that cannot be expressed as parameter updates. The model update makes fine-grained behavioral adjustments (when to invoke which tool, how to phrase a query, when to terminate) that depend on high-dimensional in-context state and cannot be captured by symbolic specification. The harness defines coarse-grained strategy architecture; the model learns to exploit it. 互补性。Harness 更新会带来离散的结构性变化（添加工具、更换控制处理器、重构提示），这些变化无法用参数更新来表达。模型更新会做更细粒度的行为调整（何时调用哪种工具、如何措辞查询、何时终止），这些依赖高维的上下文状态，无法被符号化规范捕捉。Harness 定义粗粒度的策略架构；模型则学会加以利用。

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              5.3 Model Training via Cross-Harness GRPO

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              5.3 通过跨 Harness 的 GRPO 进行模型训练

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              We adopt Group Relative Policy Optimization (GRPO) [33]. Formally, each trajectory in the buffer is generated as: 我们采用组相对策略优化（GRPO）[33]。形式上，缓冲区中的每条轨迹生成如下：

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              (1)τi∼Agent(Mk,Hk,xi),k∈{0,1,…,t},

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                               

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              where i is the (x,τ) index in the buffer B,Mk and Hk are the model checkpoint and harness used to roll out task xi into trajectory τi . Because FIFO eviction bounds the buffer to recent iterations,buffered trajectories come from model versions close to the current policy. Yet they differ markedly in strategy (tool selection, prompt structure,control-flow logic),a diversity that stems from the successive harness versions H0,…,Ht . Unlike single-policy RL, where within-group variation reduces to stochastic sampling, here harness identity dominates that variation, which makes the cross-harness grouping criterion (Eq. 2) essential for meaningful advantage estimation. 其中 i 是缓冲区 B,Mk 中的 (x,τ) 索引，Hk 分别是用于将任务 xi 展开为轨迹 τi 的模型检查点与所用的 harness。由于 FIFO 淘汰机制将缓冲区限制在最近的迭代范围内，缓冲得到的轨迹来自与当前策略相近的模型版本。然而它们在策略上差异显著（工具选择、提示结构、控制流逻辑），这种多样性源自连续的 harness 版本 H0,…,Ht。与单策略 RL 不同，在单一组内的差异在此仅会简化为随机采样；而这里 harness 的身份决定了这种差异，因此交叉-harness 分组准则（式 2）对于有意义的优势估计至关重要。

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              Formally,for a task x ,the trajectory group collects all traces of x regardless of which (Mk,Hk) pair produced them: 形式上，对于任务x，轨迹组会收集所有x的轨迹，而不论是由哪一对(Mk,Hk)生成的：

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              (2)Gx={τi∈B∣task(τi)=x}=⋃k⁡{τ∼Agent(Mk,Hk,x)}.

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                               

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              The model therefore receives gradient signal from inter-strategy reward contrasts, rather than from stochastic variation within a fixed strategy alone, which enables it to internalize strategies that succeeded across harness versions. 因此，模型接收到的是来自不同策略间奖励对比的梯度信号，而非仅来自固定策略内部随机变化的信号，这使其能够内化在各个 harness 版本中都表现成功的策略。

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              Task-level alignment, not action-level. Cross-harness GRPO performs task-level alignment: trajectories from different harness versions are grouped by task identity and compared by verifier reward alone. No action-level alignment is required, so harness versions with incompatible action spaces (different tool schemas, different prompt structures, different control-flow processors) coexist in the same group without conflict. When computing the policy gradient,each trajectory τi is replayed under the harness version Hk that produced it: the model’s log-probabilities πθ(τi∣x) are evaluated against the prompt,tool schema,and observation context that Hk would have constructed at each turn. The GRPO gradient thus operates entirely on model output tokens conditioned on harness-specific context, rather than on harness structural actions or environment transitions. This design decouples harness evolution (which may freely alter the action space across versions) from model training (which only requires token-level log-probabilities under each trajectory's own harness context). 按任务对齐，而非按动作对齐。跨 harness 的 GRPO 执行的是任务级对齐：来自不同 harness 版本的轨迹按任务身份分组，仅根据验证器奖励进行比较。无需动作级对齐，因此具有不兼容动作空间的 harness 版本（不同的工具模式、不同的提示结构、不同的控制流处理器）可以无冲突地共存于同一组中。在计算策略梯度时，每条轨迹τi都会在生成它的 harness 版本Hk下重新回放：模型的对数概率πθ(τi∣x)会根据Hk在每一步构建的提示、工具模式和观测上下文来评估。因而，GRPO 梯度完全作用于在各自 harness 上下文条件下的模型输出 token，而非 harness 的结构性动作或环境转移。该设计将 harness 演化（可在不同版本间自由改变动作空间）与模型训练（只需在各轨迹自身的 harness 上下文下计算 token 级对数概率）解耦。

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              The group-relative advantage is: 组相对优势为：

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              (3)A^(τi)=ri−μ(Gx)σ(Gx)+ϵ,

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                               

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              where ri is the reward for trajectory τi ,and μ(Gx),σ(Gx) are the within-group reward mean and standard deviation. The evolving harness acts as a structured exploration operator for the model's RL: each new version injects a distinct mode of behavior into the task's sampling distribution, and the advantage in Eq. 3 commits the model toward whichever modes the verifier scores highest. The exploration breadth that single-policy sampling cannot provide is thus supplied by the evolving scaffold itself. 其中ri是轨迹τi的奖励，μ(Gx),σ(Gx)是组内奖励均值和标准差。演化中的 harness 充当模型 RL 的结构化探索算子：每个新版本都会向任务的采样分布注入一种不同的行为模式，而式 3 中的优势则推动模型偏向验证器评分最高的那些模式。单策略采样无法提供的探索广度，因此由不断演化的支架本身提供。

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              The policy objective to maximize is: 要最大化的策略目标为：

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              (4)JGRPO(θ)=Ex,τi∼B[min(ρi(θ)A^(τi),clip(ρi(θ),1−ϵc,1+ϵc)A^(τi))]−βDKL(πθ∥π ref ),

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                               

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              where 其中

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              (5)ρi(θ)=πθ(τi∣x)πθ old (τi∣x),πθ old =Md,

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                               

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              is the importance-sampling ratio between the current policy Mk and the checkpoint Md that generated τi (Eq. 1), ϵc is the clipping threshold,and βDKL(πθ∥πref) penalizes divergence from the fixed reference model π ref  . The behavior policy πθ old  in the ratio and the reference policy π ref  in the KL term are distinct: π ref =M0 is fixed throughout training,while πθ old  varies per trajectory and must be recovered from the buffer (Section 5.4). 是当前策略Mk与生成Md（式 1）的检查点τi之间的重要性采样比率，ϵc是裁剪阈值，βDKL(πθ∥πref)用于惩罚与固定参考模型π ref 的偏离。比率中的行为策略πθ old 与 KL 项中的参考策略π ref 是不同的：π ref =M0在整个训练过程中保持固定，而πθ old 则随每条轨迹变化，必须从缓冲区中恢复（第 5.4 节）。

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              5.4 Off-Policy Training over a Mixed-Policy Buffer

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              5.4 在混合策略缓冲区上进行离策略训练

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              The replay buffer is intrinsically off-policy: at iteration t it holds trajectories generated by checkpoints M0,M1,…,Mt under harnesses H0,H1,…,Ht (Eq. 1),so the buffer distribution does not match the policy πθ under update. Recovering πθ old  for each buffered trajectory is the central off-policy challenge. 回放缓冲区本质上是离策略的：在迭代 t 时，它保存了检查点 M0,M1,…,Mt 在支架 H0,H1,…,Ht 下生成的轨迹（式 1），因此缓冲区分布与更新时的策略 πθ 不匹配。为每条缓冲轨迹恢复 πθ old  是核心的离策略难点。

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              Behavior policy πθ old  . The importance ratio (Eq. 5) corrects the gap between πθ and the checkpoint Mk that produced τi . Since Mk varies across the buffer, πθ old (τi) cannot be recovered from any single model: we materialize it at buffer insertion via one forward pass under Mk ,cache the token-level log-probabilities on disk, and reuse them at every gradient step. This decouples the cached behavior log-probabilities from the current log-probabilities πθ(τi) recomputed each step. 行为策略 πθ old  。重要性比（式 5）用于修正由 πθ 与产生 τi 的检查点 Mk 之间的差距。由于 Mk 在缓冲区中会变化，πθ old (τi) 无法从任意单一模型中恢复：我们在缓冲区插入时通过在 Mk 下进行一次前向传递来将其物化，在磁盘上缓存令牌级别的对数概率，并在每个梯度步骤中重复使用。这样就将缓存的行为对数概率与每一步重新计算得到的当前对数概率 πθ(τi) 解耦开来。

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              Bounded off-policy bias. FIFO eviction caps the buffer at C trajectories; with s samples per round the maximum model-version lag is ⌊C/s⌋ rounds,so every cached πθ old  originates within a bounded window of πθ and the policy that generated a trajectory never differs greatly from the one being updated. The same window bounds harness staleness, so the cross-harness groups (Eq. 2) mix only recent scaffold versions, and the model is never trained predominantly against an obsolete harness. 限制离策略偏差。FIFO 淘汰会将缓冲区限制在 C 条轨迹；每轮 s 个样本下，最大模型版本滞后为 ⌊C/s⌋ 轮，因此每一条缓存的 πθ old  都来自 πθ 所限定的窗口内，生成该轨迹的策略与被更新的策略从未相差太多。同样的窗口也限制了支架的陈旧性，因此跨支架分组（式 2）只混合最近的支架版本，模型从不会主要在一个过时的支架上进行训练。

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              Replay reuse at no added rollout cost. The dominant cost of agentic RL is the rollout (executing the agent in the environment: model decoding, tool calls, and verification), not the gradient update. In co-evolution a single round of exploration produces one set of trajectories that serves both updates: the same traces drive the AEGIS harness update (Section 4) and, through the shared buffer (Section 5.1), the cross-harness GRPO model update. GRPO consumes these trajectories by replay and issues no rollouts of its own. The marginal cost of adding the model update is therefore confined to (i) one cached forward pass per trajectory to record πθ old  and (ii) the gradient steps themselves,both of which are rollout-free. No trajectory is generated solely to train the model. Joint optimization is therefore economical: it buys model improvement for the price of offline training compute alone, without any rollouts beyond those harness evolution already performs. 回放复用且不增加采样成本。智能体式 RL 的主要成本来自回放过程本身（在环境中执行智能体：模型解码、工具调用与验证），而不是梯度更新。在协同演化中，一轮探索会产生一组轨迹，同时服务于两次更新：同一份轨迹驱动 AEGIS 支架更新（第 4 节），并通过共享缓冲区（第 5.1 节）驱动跨支架的 GRPO 模型更新。GRPO 通过回放消费这些轨迹，并且不进行自身的额外回合采样。因此，添加模型更新所带来的边际成本仅限于 (i) 每条轨迹一次缓存前向传递以记录 πθ old  以及 (ii) 其后的梯度步骤本身——两者都不需要额外采样。不会为了训练模型而单独生成轨迹。因此联合优化是划算的：它以离线训练计算本身为代价换取模型改进，而不需要除支架演化过程已经执行的那些之外的额外回合采样。

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              6 Experiments

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              6 实验

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              We evaluate HarnessX along five axes: overall effectiveness across benchmarks and model families (Section 6.2), the impact of variant-management strategies on stability (Section 6.3), the relative contribution of evolver architecture versus infrastructure (Section 6.4), gains from joint model-harness co-evolution (Section 6.5), and empirical confirmation of the predicted failure modes (Section 6.6). 我们从五个维度评估 HarnessX：在基准测试与模型家族上的总体有效性（第 6.2 节）、变体管理策略对稳定性的影响（第 6.3 节）、进化器架构相对于基础设施的相对贡献（第 6.4 节）、联合模型-样机协同进化带来的收益（第 6.5 节），以及对预测失效模式的实证验证（第 6.6 节）。

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              6.1 Experimental Setup

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              6.1 实验设置

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              Benchmarks. As summarized in Table 3, we evaluate on five benchmarks spanning multi-step retrieval, embodied planning, web interaction, multi-turn dialogue, and software engineering. Unless otherwise noted, each experiment runs for up to T=15 evolution rounds with early stopping after P=3 consecutive rounds without a shipped edit. The full task set is evaluated every round (no subsampling). The meta-agent token budget varies by benchmark (100M-175M total) but is held constant across task agents within a benchmark. 基准测试。如表 3 所述，我们在五个基准上评估，覆盖多步检索、具身规划、网页交互、多轮对话和软件工程。除非另有说明，每次实验最多运行 T=15 轮演化；若连续 P=3 轮都没有发布编辑内容，则提前停止。完整任务集在每一轮都会评估（不做抽样）。元智能体的令牌预算随基准而变化（总计 100M-175M），但在同一基准内，对所有任务智能体保持不变。

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              Table 3 Benchmark characteristics. 表 3 基准特性。

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              BenchmarkDomainSampled TasksVerifier
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              GAIA (Level 1-3)Multi-step retrieval103Exact match
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              ALFWorldEmbodied planning134Goal completion
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              WebShopWeb interaction100Attribute match
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              ${\tau }^{3}$ -BenchMulti-turn dialogue3 domainsRule compliance
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              SWE-bench VerifiedSoftware engineering55Patch resolution
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              基准领域采样任务验证器
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              GAIA（1-3级）多步检索103精确匹配
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              ALFWorld具身规划134目标完成
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              WebShop网页交互100属性匹配
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              ${\tau }^{3}$-Bench多轮对话3个领域规则遵循
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              SWE-bench Verified软件工程55补丁修复

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              Models. We distinguish two roles: the meta-agent (Claude Opus 4.6 unless otherwise noted) drives the AEGIS evolution loop; the task agent runs under the evolved harness to solve benchmark tasks. Task agents span three families (Claude Sonnet 4.6, GPT-5.4, and Qwen3.5-9B) to test whether a single meta-agent can evolve effective harnesses across model families. 模型。我们区分两种角色：元智能体（除非另有说明为 Claude Opus 4.6）驱动 AEGIS 演化循环；任务智能体在已演化的训练框架之上运行，用于完成基准任务。任务智能体覆盖三类模型（Claude Sonnet 4.6、GPT-5.4 和 Qwen3.5-9B），用于检验单一元智能体能否在不同模型家族中演化出有效的训练框架。

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              Baselines. (1) Static Harness: a HarnessX configuration constructed from published benchmark-specific prompts and tool definitions, held fixed across all rounds. (2) Claude Code SDK (CC SDK) 1 : a single-agent evolver (one LLM session per round) that replaces the four-stage pipeline while retaining the same infrastructure and round budget, isolating AEGIS's multi-stage architecture from the shared infrastructure (Section 6.4). This baseline also serves as a proxy for monolithic evolvers such as SICA [31]. 基线。(1) 静态训练框架：由已发布的面向基准的提示词与工具定义构建的 HarnessX 配置，在所有轮次中保持不变。(2) Claude Code SDK（CC SDK）1：单智能体演化器（每轮一次 LLM 会话），在保留相同基础设施与轮次预算的同时，替代四阶段流水线；从而将 AEGIS 的多阶段架构与共享基础设施隔离开（第 6.4 节）。该基线也可作为如 SICA [31] 这类整体式演化器的代理。

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              Metrics. Task success rate (%) under the benchmark-specific verifier. Each task receives two independent attempts per round (pass@2: solved if either succeeds), reducing sampling noise while preserving a binary per-task signal for the seesaw constraint (at the cost of masking sub-threshold success-probability drift; Section 6.3). 指标。在基准专用验证器下的任务成功率（%）。每个任务在每轮获得两次独立尝试（pass@2：任一成功则视为解题），从而降低采样噪声，同时为 seesaw 约束保留每任务的二元信号（代价是会掩蔽低于阈值的成功概率漂移；第 6.3 节）。

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              Scope. All reported gains are measured on the same task set used for evolution; held-out generalization to unseen tasks is not evaluated in this work. 范围。所有报告的增益均在用于演化的同一任务集上测得；本文不评估对未见任务的泛化能力。

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              6.2 Main Results

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              6.2 主要结果

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              Table 4 and Figure 4 report pass@2 success rates before and after harness evolution. AEGIS improves 14 of 15 model-benchmark configurations, with an average gain of +14.5% (up to +44.0%). The single stagnating configuration (GAIA, GPT-5.4, Δ=0.0) reflects a fundamental limitation of single-harness evolution on heterogeneous task sets; Section 6.3 shows that variant isolation resolves this. One configuration regressed mid-run (τ3 -Bench Telecom, −14.0% at R7) due to accumulated same-type edits,recovering by R9 (Section 6.6). 表4和图4给出了基准性能在采纳前后（harness evolution）的pass@2成功率。AEGIS在15种模型-基准配置中的14种上均提升，平均增益为+14.5%（最高+44.0%）。唯一停滞的配置（GAIA，GPT-5.4，Δ=0.0）反映了在异构任务集合上进行单一harness演化的根本性限制；第6.3节表明，变体隔离能够解决这一问题。另有一个配置在运行中途(τ3 -Bench Telecom, −14.0%（在R7）出现回退，原因是同类型编辑的累计；到R9恢复（第6.6节）。

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              Overall performance. Evolution improves 14 of 15 configurations. Gains range from +11.2% to +44.0% on ALFWorld, +13.0% to +18.0% on WebShop, and +10.9% to +18.2% on SWE-bench Verified. On GAIA, Sonnet 4.6 (+9.7%) and Qwen3.5-9B (+17.1%) improve,while GPT-5.4 stagnates ( Δ=0.0 ; resolving its failures demands mutually conflicting edits that no single-harness strategy can accommodate). On τ3 -Bench, GPT-5.4 gains most (+14.5%) while Qwen3.5-9B gains only +1.1% due to its near-ceiling 93.5% baseline. 整体性能。演化使15种配置中的14种得到提升。在ALFWorld上增益范围为+11.2%到+44.0%，在WebShop上为+13.0%到+18.0%，在SWE-bench Verified上为+10.9%到+18.2%。在GAIA上，Sonnet 4.6（+9.7%）和Qwen3.5-9B（+17.1%）都有改进，而GPT-5.4停滞（ Δ=0.0 ；要修复其失败需要彼此冲突的编辑，而单一harness策略无法兼顾。在τ3-Bench上，GPT-5.4增益最大（+14.5%），而Qwen3.5-9B仅提升+1.1%，因为其基线接近上限93.5%。

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              Inverse scaling with baseline performance. Across benchmarks, the weakest task agent (Qwen3.5-9B) consistently gains most: +44.0% on ALFWorld (baseline 53.0%), +17.1% on GAIA (baseline 20.3%), and +18.2% on SWE-bench Verified (baseline 23.6%). Stronger models (Sonnet 4.6, GPT-5.4) gain less on 与基线性能的反向缩放关系。跨各基准来看，最弱的任务代理（Qwen3.5-9B）始终提升最大：在ALFWorld上为+44.0%（基线53.0%）；在GAIA上为+17.1%（基线20.3%）；在SWE-bench Verified上为+18.2%（基线23.6%）。更强的模型（Sonnet 4.6、GPT-5.4）在

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                               

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              1 Claude Code SDK v0.0.25,model="opus" (Claude Opus 4.6),max_turns=200. Experiments conducted in May 2026. 1 Claude Code SDK v0.0.25，model="opus"（Claude Opus 4.6），max_turns=200。实验于2026年5月进行。

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                               

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                               

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              Figure 4 Evolution trajectories (pass@2 success rate vs. round). Dashed lines: static-harness baselines. 图4 演化轨迹（pass@2成功率 vs. 轮次）。虚线：静态harness基线。

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              Table 4 Main results (pass@2 success rate, %). Evolved = peak accuracy achieved. "" indicates domain-averaged results where no single peak round applies. 表4 主要结果（pass@2成功率，%）。Evolved=达到的峰值准确率。“”表示领域平均结果，即不存在适用于单一峰值轮次的情况。

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              ALFWorldClaude Sonnet 4.683.694.8+11.27
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              GPT-5.476.997.8+20.94
