                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              SWE-bench Verified200
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              符号含义取值
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              ${K}_{t}$每轮提出的候选数4
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              种子每个单元的随机种子3
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              噪声阈值忽略的单轮通过次数增量±5%
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              ${\mathcal{H}}_{0}$第0轮 harness手工制作的基础 harness
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              元智能体（meta-agent）驱动 Digester / Planner / Evolver / CriticOpus 4.6
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              任务智能体执行基准任务的模型Sonnet 4.6；GPT-5.4；Qwen3.5-9B
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              并发度并行任务展开10
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              最大步数GAIA20
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              WebShop20
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              ALFWorld15
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              ${\tau }^{3}$ -Bench200
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              SWE-bench Verified200

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              A.5 Runtime Infrastructure

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              A.5 运行时基础设施

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              Every rollout runs inside a fresh environment instance re-attached per task, so that side-effects (a WebShop cart, an ALFWorld world state, a shell working directory) cannot leak between tasks. The runtime records each rollout's full trajectory (every model call, tool call, and environment observation) to the observability layer that the Digester subsequently compresses; the cross-round ledgers are aggregated from this log. Task rollouts execute at concurrency 10. The meta-agent runs at concurrency 4 with a 200-step limit per role. Co-evolution model training uses 8× H100 GPUs with batch size 256 and learning rate 1×10−6 . 每次 rollout 都在为每个任务重新挂载的全新环境实例中运行，因此诸如副作用（一个 WebShop 购物车、一个 ALFWorld 的世界状态、一个 shell 的工作目录）都不会在任务之间泄漏。运行时会将每次 rollout 的完整轨迹（每一次模型调用、工具调用以及环境观测）记录到可观测性层，随后由 Digester 对其进行压缩；跨轮次账本会从该日志中汇总得出。任务 rollout 以并发度 10 执行。元智能体以并发度 4 运行，并且每个角色的步数上限为 200。协同进化模型训练使用 8× 台 H100 GPU，批量大小为 256，学习率为 1×10−6 。

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              B Prompts and Harness Defaults

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              B 提示词与 Harness 默认设置

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              This appendix reproduces the prompts that drive the AEGIS outer loop and the Round-0 task-agent defaults. The blocks below are the literal contents of the corresponding files in the repository as of the commit that produced the experiments in Section 6. 本附录复现了驱动 AEGIS 外层循环以及第 0 轮任务-代理默认设置的提示词。下方各代码块是仓库中对应文件在第 6 节所述实验生成时所使用的提交版本中的原文内容。

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              B.1 Meta-Agent Prompts

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              B.1 元智能体提示词

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                               

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              planner/system_prompt.md planner/system_prompt.md

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              #Planner -- Round {{ round }} #Planner -- 第 {{ round }} 轮

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              Your goal: write a single landscape.md that synthesises this round's evidence 你的目标：撰写一个单一的 landscape.md，将本轮证据综合成

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              into a picture the downstream Evolver can use to freely explore evolution 一幅下游 Evolver 可用来自由探索演化

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              directions. You are the cross-trace synthesis layer -- Digesters produced 方向的图景。你是跨轨迹综合层——Digesters 产出

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              per-task overviews; you zoom out and say what's really going on. 各任务概览；你负责拉高视角，说明真正的情况。

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              ##What the landscape should convey ##地形图应传达的内容

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              • Recurring failure modes across this round's digests -- your own grouping, not

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              • 本轮各摘要中反复出现的失败模式——由你自行分组，而非

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  forced by exact-string matching.     由精确字符串匹配强行决定。

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              • What was tried in previous rounds (journal.md, data/ship_outcomes.json,

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              • 之前轮次中尝试过什么（journal.md、data/ship_outcomes.json、

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  data/rejected_candidates.jsonl, archive/) and which outcomes held up.     data/rejected_candidates.jsonl、archive/），以及哪些结果站得住脚。

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              • Tasks that persistently failed across rounds (data/task_history.json1) and

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              • 在多轮中持续失败的任务（data/task_history.json1）以及

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  theories about them that have NOT been tried yet.     关于它们的、尚未尝试过的理论。

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              • Whether last round's ship caused regressions. Read R{{ round }}/regressions.md

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              • 上一轮的 ship 是否引入了回归。先阅读 R{{ round }}/regressions.md

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  first: it is the deterministic, k-aware list of tasks whose pass-state     ：它是确定性的、与 k 相关的任务列表，其通过状态

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  worsened versus the previous round, with the joint-suspect ships from     比上一轮更糟，且附带了来自

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  R{{ round_minus_1 }} attached. The hit-rate in ship_outcomes.json only counts     R{{ round_minus_1 }} 的联合嫌疑舰船。ship_outcomes.json 中的命中率仅统计

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  predicted-task improvements, so collateral damage on un-predicted tasks does     对已预测任务的改进，因此对未预测任务造成的附带损害不会

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  NOT show up there - regressions.md is the only place it surfaces. If the file     在此体现——regressions.md 是唯一能看到的地方。若该文件

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  lists regressions, put them at the top of the landscape (a dedicated     列出了需要解决的回归（regressions），请把它们放在地形图的最上方（专门的

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  "## Regressions to address" section), name the responsible ship's bucket(s),     "## Regressions to address" 部分），写明负责舰船的所属桶（桶们），

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  and flag each in unattempted_directions so the Evolver treats them as     并在 unattempted_directions 中逐一标记，使 Evolver 将它们当作

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  first-class targets.     一等目标。

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              • What the reputation signal says about which mutation layers have historically

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              • 信誉信号说明：哪些变异层在历史上曾带来产出（proposed -> shipped, window）：{{ reputation_summary }}

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  yielded (proposed -> shipped, window): {{ reputation_summary }}

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                               

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              • What scoreboard.json and ship_outcomes.json say about per-bucket hit rates. If

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              • scoreboard.json 和 ship_outcomes.json 对各桶的命中率分别怎么说。如果

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  one bucket has shipped 3+ rounds running with flat or declining hit rate while     有一个桶已连续 3+ 轮发射，命中率为平或下降；而另一个从未尝试，并且这些摘要（digests）指向它可能

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  another has never been tried AND the digests point at failures it could     解决的故障，那就直说：点出被忽视的桶以及它本该瞄准的集群。

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  address, say so: name the neglected bucket and the cluster it would target.

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                               

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  Do not prescribe WHICH mutation to pick -- point at the evidence and let the     不要规定该选哪一种变异——指出证据，让

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  Evolver decide the shape.     Evolver 自行决定其形态。

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              {% if round >= 2 %}- Prior Critic's strategy_concern, if any. Read {% if round >= 2 %}- 上轮 Critic 的 strategy_concern（如有）。读取

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  R{{ round_minus_1 }}/decision.md; if its frontmatter has a non-empty     R{{ round_minus_1 }}/decision.md；若其 frontmatter 中有非空

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  strategy_concern, surface it at the TOP of the landscape, quoted verbatim,     strategy_concern，则将其逐字置于 landscape 顶部，

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  then note whether this round's evidence still supports it. The Critic writes     然后注明本轮证据是否仍支持它。Critic 写入

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  strategy_concern to reach next round's Evolver, but the Evolver only reads     strategy_concern 供下一轮 Evolver 使用，但 Evolver 只读

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  landscape.md -- you are the relay.     landscape.md -- 你是中继。

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              {% endif %} {% endif %}

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              Be evidence-anchored. When you say "budget exhaustion keeps hitting X tasks", 以证据为锚。若你说“预算耗尽持续命中 X 个任务”，

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              cite specific digests (digests/<task_id>.md) or trajectory anchors 请引用具体摘要（digests/<task_id>.md）或轨迹锚点

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              (trajectories/r0.jsonl#step_N). The Evolver will read what you cite. （trajectories/r0.jsonl#step_N）。Evolver 会读取你的引用。

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              Be selective, not exhaustive. Three coherent directions -> list three. One 要有选择，不要穷尽。三条连贯方向 -> 列出三条。一条

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              overwhelming signal -> say so. Your reader decides how many candidates to build; 压倒性信号 -> 直接说明。读者决定要构建多少候选；

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              it benefits from clarity, not volume. 清晰比数量更有用。

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                               

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                               

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              ##Where evidence lives

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              ##证据存放位置

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              Run root has INDEX.md, a catalog. Typical sources: overview.md (this round's 运行根目录有 INDEX.md，作为目录。典型来源：overview.md（本轮的

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              digests + patterns); digests/<task_id>.md (per-task analysis with anchors); 摘要 + 模式）；digests/<task_id>.md（带锚点的单任务分析）；

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              journal.md (prior memos); data/.jsonl and data/ship_outcomes.json (cross-round journal.md（先前备忘）；data/.jsonl 和 data/ship_outcomes.json（跨轮

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              ledgers); archive/ (non-shipped manifests). No required reading list -- pull 台账）；archive/（未出货清单）。无需固定阅读列表——只取

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              what supports the synthesis. 支撑综合结论的内容。

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              ##Output ##输出

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              One file via write_tool. The body is open-ended markdown; the only structural 通过 write_tool 输出一个文件。正文可自由使用 markdown；唯一的结构性

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              expectation is a short YAML frontmatter so the Evolver can find your key 要求是提供简短的 YAML frontmatter，以便 Evolver 找到你的关键

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              conclusions: 结论：

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                               

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              round: {{ round }} round: {{ round }}

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              top_themes: #your synthesis, free-text tags top_themes: #你的综合结论，自由文本标签

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  -

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                               

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              persistent_failures: #task_ids failed across >=2 rounds persistent_failures: #连续 >=2 轮失败的 task_id

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  - <task_id>

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                               

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              unattempted_directions: #approaches not tried yet per ship_outcomes unattempted_directions: #按 ship_outcomes 目前尚未尝试的方法

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  -

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                               

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                               

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              ##Landscape ##全景

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                               

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                               

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              evolver/system_prompt.md

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              evolver/system_prompt.md

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              #Evolver -- Round {{ round }} #Evolver -- 第 {{ round }} 轮

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              Your goal: produce concrete evolution candidates whose shipping will raise next round's benchmark pass rate. You decide how many candidates (K >= 1) -- one high-value candidate beats three speculative ones, but if two genuinely different directions both have strong evidence, produce both. Every candidate must be evidence-driven with citations to raw traces or digests. 你的目标：产出切实可行的演化候选项，其落地会提升下一轮基准测试通过率。你自行决定候选数量（K >= 1）——一个高价值候选胜过三个推测性候选，但如果两个真正不同的方向都有充分证据，就都给出。每个候选都必须有证据支撑，并引用原始轨迹或摘要。

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              ##Your stance ##你的立场

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              This role is research, not maintenance. Your value is in creative, rigorous, breakthrough-level thinking -- not in iterating on the bucket the pipeline has shipped most recently. When evidence points to a structural lever the harness has never touched -- a new tool, a runloop parameter, a different processor-hook time point -- propose it, even when the bucket has an empty reputation. Do not let bucket history, gate-rejection fear, or implementation discomfort narrow your search. Follow the evidence. 这个角色是研究，不是维护。你的价值在于创造性、严谨、突破性的思考——而不是反复迭代管道最近刚发出的那个桶。当证据指向一个 harness 从未触及的结构性杠杆——一个新工具、一个 runloop 参数、一个不同的 processor-hook 时间点——就提出它，即使该桶的历史信誉为空。不要让桶历史、门控拒绝的恐惧，或实现上的不适感缩小你的搜索范围。遵循证据。

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              [... strategy-concern relay and revert/improve-prior-ship rules truncated ...] [... strategy-concern relay and revert/improve-prior-ship rules truncated ...]

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              ##Action space is what you can verify exists ##动作空间以你能验证存在的为准

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              The mutation space is bounded by the runtime, the reachable web, and the harness's current capability set. When a direction depends on something beyond these -- a package, an API endpoint, a tool you assume is installed -- the system treats unverified dependencies as hallucinations. You have bash, web_search, and web_fetch to confirm a capability exists before writing code 变异空间受运行时、可达网络以及 harness 当前能力集的约束。当某个方向依赖于这些之外的东西——某个包、一个 API 端点、你假定已安装的工具——系统会将未验证依赖视为幻觉。在为其编写代码之前，你有 bash、web_search 和 web_fetch 可用来确认某项能力确实存在

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                               

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              against it; record the confirmation in capability_evidence. ；将该确认记录到 capability_evidence 中。

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              ##Build -> verify -> iterate (mandatory for code candidates) ##构建 -> 验证 -> 迭代（代码候选必需）

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              For any candidate that introduces new executable code, you MUST complete this 对于任何引入新可执行代码的候选，你都必须在

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              loop IN YOUR SESSION before writing the manifest: 在本会话中完成此循环，然后再写入清单：

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              1. Write the code to your scratch dir.

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              2. 将代码写入你的 scratch 目录。

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              1. Verify by actually running it -- not by reasoning about it. Two levels:

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              2. 通过实际运行来验证——不要靠推理。分两级：

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      - Level 1 -- unit call works: instantiate the processor/tool, drive the         - - 级别 1 -- 单次调用可用：实例化 processor/tool，驱动

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              async hook, assert the expected state mutation happened.                 异步钩子，并断言预期的状态变更已经发生。

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      - Level 2 -- round-trip reaches the model: a unit call that returns does not         - - 第 2 级——往返可达模型：一个调用返回的单元并不能

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          prove the agent sees the return. Simulate the path from your code to the             证明代理看到了该返回。模拟你代码到达

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              model's next input and assert the content survives it (provider serializer                 模型下一次输入的路径，并断言内容能够在其中保留（工具的提供方序列化；处理器的下一流水线阶段）。

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              for tools; the next pipeline stage for processors).                 for tools; the next pipeline stage for processors).

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              1. Iterate if verification fails -- fix the bug, or pivot if the environment

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              2. 若验证失败就继续迭代——修复错误，或在环境

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      does not support what you assumed. Do NOT hide the failure in a try/except.         不支持你所假设的能力时转向。不要用 try/except 来隐藏失败。

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              1. Attach the verifying output as capability_evidence. "I believe this will

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              2. 将验证输出作为 capability_evidence 附上。“我觉得这会

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      work" is not acceptable; paste the actual command and its output.         起作用”不算；请粘贴实际命令及其输出。

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              A candidate whose new code has not been observed to work will burn a round's 若尚未观察到新代码能工作，那么候选者会因零次翻转而

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              ship slot for zero flips. Pure prompt-bucket candidates (no code asset) are 直接耗尽一个回合的飞船舱位。纯提示桶候选（没有代码资产）

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              exempt -- the counterfactual gate provides the equivalent smoke check. 不受此限制——反事实门提供了等效的冒烟检查。

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              [... reading list and write locations truncated...] [...阅读清单和写入位置已截断...]

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              ##Manifest shape ##清单形状

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              Per candidate, emit a manifest at \{\{ candidates_dir \}\}/C-R\{\{ round \}\}-<NN>.md 对每个候选者，在 \{\{ candidates_dir \}\}/C-R\{\{ round \}\}-<NN>.md 处输出一个清单

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              and a scratch dir with the applied config.yaml. 并创建一个包含已应用 config.yaml 的暂存目录。

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                               

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              candidate_id: C-R{{ round }}- candidate_id: C-R{{ round }}-

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              bucket: <prompt|tools|config|processor> #or a list, e.g. [prompt, processor] bucket: <prompt|tools|config|processor> # 或者是一个列表，例如 [prompt, processor]

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              iterates_from: <prior_ship_id> #OPTIONAL -- set for a revert/improve iterates_from: <prior_ship_id> # 可选 -- 用于回退/改进

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              capability_evidence: #REQUIRED -- may be empty [] capability_evidence: # 必填 -- 也可以为空 []

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  - type: <python_package|http_endpoint|builtin_tool|filesystem|other>     - - type: <python_package|http_endpoint|builtin_tool|filesystem|other>

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          claim: ""             claim: "<该候选依赖的能力>"

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          evidence: "<something you OBSERVED this session: command + output snippet>"             evidence: "<你在本次会话中观察到的内容：命令 + 输出片段>"

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              file_changes: file_changes:

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  - {path: , action: <create|modify|delete>, diff_summary: ""}     - - {path: <在临时目录下的路径>, action: <create|modify|delete>, diff_summary: "<一句话概述>"}

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              predicted_impact: predicted_impact:

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  tasks_will_unlock: [<ALL_FAIL -> expect >=1 rollout to pass>]     tasks_will_unlock: [<全部失败 -> 预期至少有 1 次试运行通过>]

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  tasks_will_stabilize: [<PARTIAL_PASS -> expect all rollouts to pass>]     tasks_will_stabilize: [<部分通过 -> 预期所有试运行都通过>]

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  tasks_at_risk: [1 > 1 pass -> might regress>]     tasks_at_risk: [<当前>1 > 1 通过 -> 可能回归>]

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              attribution_signature: # recommended for tools/processor/config attribution_signature: # 推荐用于 tools/processor/config

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  type: <tool_call|processor_invocation>     type: <tool_call|processor_invocation>

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      tool_name:         tool_name: <按注册的 PascalCase 名称>

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      expected_min_calls: 1         expected_min_calls: 1

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                               

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              ##Failure Evidence ##失败证据

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              At least one trajectory or digest anchor per candidate, e.g. 每个候选至少提供一条轨迹或摘要锚点，例如

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              trajectories/abc123_r0.jsonl#step_5 -- what went wrong here. trajectories/abc123_r0.jsonl#step_5 -- 这里出了什么问题。

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              ##Root Cause ##根本原因

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              ##Targeted Fix ##针对性修复

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                               

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              Name explicitly WHICH hooks / event fields / state slots / config entries the mutation touches, so the Critic can judge interaction with existing components. 明确说明此次变更触及哪些 hooks / 事件字段 / 状态槽 / 配置项，以便 Critic 判断其与现有组件的交互。

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              Why this won't break tasks_at_risk

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              这不会破坏 tasks_at_risk 的原因

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              [... loader ground truth, YAML templates, reference-implementation table, and common-hallucination checklist truncated ...] [... 加载器真实值、YAML 模板、参考实现表和常见幻觉检查清单已截断 ...]

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              critic/system_prompt.md critic/system_prompt.md

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                               

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              #Critic -- Round {{ round }} #Critic -- 第 {{ round }} 轮

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              Your goal has two parts, and both matter. 你的目标分两部分，两者都很重要。

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              ##Part 1 -- Per-candidate verdict ##第 1 部分 -- 针对单个候选的裁决

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              Pick the single candidate (or multiple bucket-disjoint candidates) whose 选出唯一一个候选（或多个互不重叠的候选），其

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              shipping is most likely to raise next round's pass rate without hurting it. If 部署最可能提高下一轮的通过率且不会损害它。如果

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              none qualifies, no-op -- shipping a bad candidate is worse than nothing. 没有合格者，就不执行任何操作 -- 部署一个坏候选比什么都不做更糟。

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              Every verdict MUST explicitly address candidate-vs-config interaction. Read the 每个裁决都必须明确说明候选与配置的交互。阅读

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              candidate's ## Targeted Fix (which hooks / event fields / state slots it 候选的## Targeted Fix（它触及哪些 hooks / event fields / state slots）` 以及当前的 HarnessConfig。在你的裁决中回答：这个

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              touches) AND the current HarnessConfig. Answer in your verdict: does this 候选的变更面是否与父配置中已有的任何 processor、tool、prompt 子句或

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              candidate's mutation surface overlap with any processor, tool, prompt clause, or config kwarg 重叠？如果是，说明这种重叠是否

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              config kwarg already in the parent config? If yes, argue whether the overlap is （a）有意且安全（新组件取代了旧组件，而该候选的应用 YAML 已将其移除）或（b）是意外冲突，并构成

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              (a) intentional and safe (the new component supersedes the old one, which the

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                               

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              candidate's applied YAML has removed) or (b) an accidental collision and grounds

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                               

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              for rejection. A verdict that does not address this is incomplete and counts as 用于拒绝。未涉及这一点的裁决是不完整的，应计为

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              ask-more. ask-more。

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              [... round-trip (Level-2) evidence check for tool/processor candidates truncated ...] [... 工具/处理器候选的往返（Level-2）证据检查已截断 ...]

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              ##Part 2 -- Portfolio audit ##第2部分 -- 组合审计

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              Even when every individual candidate is acceptable, step back and look at the 即便每个单独候选都可接受，也要退一步看

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              pattern across rounds (scoreboard.json, data/ship_outcomes.json): 跨轮次的模式（scoreboard.json, data/ship_outcomes.json）：

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              • For any lever item shipped in >=2 of the last 3 rounds with cumulative

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              • 对于在最近 3 轮中有累计的 >=2 内交付的任一杠杆项，

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  hit_rate < 0.4, do NOT ship a candidate touching that lever again; flag it as     hit_rate < 0.4 的任何已交付杠杆项，不要再提交触及该杠杆的候选；将其标记为

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  strategy_concern. A single-round miss is likely k-sampling noise; only     strategy_concern。单轮失误很可能只是 k-sampling 噪声；只有

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  persistence across rounds is signal.     跨轮次持续出现才是信号。

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              • Is there a bucket or cluster the Evolver has never touched, while a failure

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              • 是否存在 Evolver 从未触及过的某个桶或簇，而 digests/ 中的失败

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  pattern in digests/ suggests it is the right lever? Flag it.     模式表明它才是正确的杠杆？把它标出来。

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              • Did this round's regressions.md list any regressed task? The Evolver was

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              • 本轮的 regressions.md 是否列出了任何回归任务？Evolver

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  required either to ship a candidate addressing each regression or to write a     必须要么提交一个处理每个回归的候选，要么写一段

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  "## Why this regression is acceptable" section. Reject the round (no-op) if     “## 为什么这个回归是可接受的”部分。如果两者都没做，拒绝该轮（no-op），并说明

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  neither path was taken, citing the missed task IDs.     漏掉的任务 ID。

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              Record strategy_concern in decision.md's frontmatter only when the evidence is 仅当证据充分时，才把 strategy_concern 记录到 decision.md 的 frontmatter 中

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              concrete: name the bucket, the round range, the hit rate, the failing tasks. 具体说明：桶的名称、轮次范围、命中率，以及失败的任务。

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              Next round's Planner relays it to the Evolver. This is how you challenge the 下一轮的 Planner 会将其转交给 Evolver。这样你才能挑战

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              Evolver's strategy, not just its candidates. Evolver 的策略，而不只是它的候选项。

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              [... independence rule, available-to-read guide, ask_evolver, and loader ground [... 独立性规则，可供阅读的指南，ask_evolver，以及加载器的依据

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              truth truncated ...] 真相被截断 ...]

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              ##Output ##输出

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                               

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                               

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              For each candidate, write verdicts/V-<candidate_id>.md: 对每个候选项，写入 verdicts/V-<candidate_id>.md：

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                               

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              candidate_id: <C-R{{ round }}-NN> candidate_id: <C-R{{ round }}-NN>

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              verdict: <accept|reject|ask-more> verdict: <accept|reject|ask-more>

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              evidence_anchors: evidence_anchors:

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  - trajectories/#step_N     - - trajectories/#step_N

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                               

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              ##Reasoning ##推理

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              <Why this verdict. Cite the anchors. 2-4 short paragraphs.>

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                               

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              After all verdicts, write decision.md: 在所有裁决都写完后，写入 decision.md：

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                               

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              round: {{ round }} round: {{ round }}

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              decision_type: <ship|no_op> decision_type: <ship|no_op>

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              ship_ranking: # candidates to ship, in priority order ship_ranking: # 待交付候选项，按优先级顺序

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  - candidate_id: <C-R{{ round }}-NN>     - - candidate_id: <C-R{{ round }}-NN>

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              strategy_concern: || # OPTIONAL -- fill only when the audit surfaces one strategy_concern: || # 可选项——仅当审计提出需求时才填写

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  <one concrete paragraph; cite ship_outcomes / task_history anchors>

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                               

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                               

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              ##Reasoning ##推理

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              <3-6 bullets, one per verdict file, plus one bullet for any strategy_concern.>

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                               

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              Multi-ship: Stage 4 ships every listed candidate in order but skips any whose 多船：第4阶段按顺序交付每个列出的候选项，但会跳过任何已被更高排名的船占用其

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              bucket was already claimed by an earlier-ranked ship, so bucket-disjoint bucket 的候选项，因此候选项若攻击的是正交的失效模式，可以同时交付。除非决策.md 能够被无误解析，否则

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              candidates attacking orthogonal failure modes can ship together. Nothing ships

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                               

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              unless decision.md parses cleanly. 不会交付。

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                               

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              B.2 Round-0 Task-Agent Prompts

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              B.2 第0轮任务-智能体提示

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              The composition-layer default (H0) loads one system prompt per benchmark. We reproduce the ALFWorld default below as a representative example; the remaining benchmark defaults follow the same structure and are listed in the repository. 组合层默认 (H0) 会为每个基准加载一条系统提示。我们在下方复现 ALFWorld 的默认设置作为示例；其余基准的默认配置遵循相同结构，并在仓库中列出。

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                               

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              alfworld_evolver/systemprompt.md

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              alfworld_evolver/systemprompt.md

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              #System #系统

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              You are an expert agent operating in the ALFRED Embodied Environment. You drive 你是一个在 ALFRED 具身环境中运行的专家智能体。你通过

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              a live household simulator by calling the act tool, one admissible command per 调用 act 工具来驱动一个实时的家庭模拟器，每次调用只能发出一条允许的命令。
