                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              Per-model evolution logic. Evolution is prompt-and-processor driven for every model, with zero tools edits: the tool set is fixed and no cluster is one that a new tool could close. Sonnet 4.6 splits prompt/processor (23/18),GPT-5.4 ships the most balanced mix (19/20) ,and Qwen3.5-9B ships fewer overall (14/9) . Since τ3 failures are control-flow and judgment errors, the productive levers are prompt rules that encode the policy's ordering constraints and processors that enforce them mid-dialogue. 按模型的演化逻辑。每个模型的演化都由提示词与处理器驱动，且为零工具编辑：工具集固定，并且没有任何簇是新工具能够关闭的。Sonnet 4.6 将提示词/处理器分配为（23/18），GPT-5.4 提供了最均衡的混合 (19/20) ，而 Qwen3.5-9B 的整体 (14/9) 更少。由于 τ3 属于控制流与判断错误，起作用的关键在于：用提示词规则编码政策的排序约束，并由处理器在对话中途执行这些约束。

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              Did evolution close the clusters? Config is the sharpest lever where used (Qwen3.5 0.67, GPT-5.4 0.33 hit-rate) but is shipped rarely; the high-volume prompt and processor levers are moderately effective (0.27-0.35), matching the control-flow nature of the dominant clusters. Gains track base-model headroom: GPT-5.4 starts lowest (76.2%) and gains most (+14.5pp), Sonnet 4.6 gains +5.4pp, and near-ceiling Qwen3.5-9B only +1.1pp. The loop is not monotone; Sonnet's telecom run reaches 100% at R4, regresses to 80.7% at R7 after a sixth consecutive same-bucket edit, then recovers to 99.1% by R9 (Section 6.6). Overall, the ordering-enforcing levers close the premature-action and missed-step clusters most reliably, while wrong-selection and policy-judgment errors are the harder residual. 演化是否关闭了这些簇？当使用时，配置（config）是最锋利的杠杆（Qwen3.5 0.67，GPT-5.4 0.33 命中率），但很少被采用。高频的提示词与处理器杠杆效果适中（0.27-0.35），符合占主导地位的簇本质是控制流问题这一特征。收益与基础模型的余量一致：GPT-5.4 起点最低（76.2%）且提升最多（+14.5pp），Sonnet 4.6 提升 +5.4pp，而接近上限的 Qwen3.5-9B 仅 +1.1pp。该循环并非单调；Sonnet 的电信运行在 R4 达到 100% 后，由于连续第六次做同一桶内的编辑，在 R7 回落到 80.7%，随后在 R9 恢复到 99.1%（第 6.6 节）。总体而言，强制排序的杠杆最可靠地关闭了过早操作与遗漏步骤簇；而错误选择与政策判断错误是更难残留的问题。

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                               

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              Figure 11 τ3 -Bench evolution analysis,pooled over the airline,retail,and telecom domains. (a) Failure clusters from the logged digests (harness-interrupt traces excluded); judgment errors (premature action and wrong selection) dominate. (b) Lever mix by model: prompt and processor carry the climb, with zero tools edits since the tool set is fixed. (c) Lever effectiveness; config is sharpest where used (Qwen3.5 0.67) but rare, while prompt and processor are the consistent high-volume levers. 图 11 τ3 -Bench 的演化分析，跨航空、零售与电信领域进行汇聚。（a）来自记录摘要的失败簇（排除 harness-interrupt 轨迹）；判断错误（过早操作与错误选择）占主导。（b）按模型的杠杆组合：提示词与处理器承担了提升过程，且为零工具编辑，因为工具集固定。（c）杠杆有效性；配置在使用时最关键（Qwen3.5 0.67），但很少出现；而提示词与处理器是稳定且高频的杠杆。

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              D.5 SWE-bench Verified

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              D.5 SWE-bench Verified

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              SWE-bench Verified stresses repository-level code editing. Figure 12 shows its clusters, per-model logic, and effectiveness. SWE-bench Verified 聚焦于仓库级代码编辑。图 12 展示了它的簇、各模型逻辑以及有效性。

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              Failure clusters and their causes. Panel (a) summarizes the failure clusters pooled across all rounds and all three models. The dominant cluster is incomplete fix (62%) ,where the agent reaches the right region and produces a valid patch but covers only one branch or call site while the gold patch needs several. Wrong diagnosis (19%) follows, covering edits to the wrong file or abstraction level after misreading the root cause. The remaining tail is mechanical rather than cognitive: no edit attempted (6%), Edit anchor mismatch (5%), and budget exhausted (4%). Notably the composition is the inverse of reward-hacking: failures are under-fixes, not gamed evaluations, because the harness applies the gold test patch before the model patch and blocks test-file writes. 失败簇及其原因。图(a)汇总了所有轮次与三个模型共同汇聚的失败簇。主要簇是未完成修复 (62%) ：智能体进入了正确区域并生成了有效补丁，但只覆盖了一个分支或调用点，而金标准补丁需要覆盖多个。错误诊断（19%）紧随其后：由于误读根因，对错误文件或抽象层级进行了修改。其余长尾偏机械而非认知：未尝试编辑（6%）、编辑锚点不匹配（5%）以及预算耗尽（4%）。值得注意的是，这种构成与“奖励欺骗”相反：失败是未完成修复，而非被用来“对评测动手脚”，因为 harness 会先应用金标准测试补丁，再应用模型补丁，并阻止对测试文件的写入。

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              Per-model evolution logic. Panel (b) shows that SWE-bench is prompt-first for every model, with the secondary lever tracking base-model strength. All three runs ship zero tools edits, since unlike GAIA the failure set has no mechanical-retrieval cluster a tool could close. Sonnet pairs prompt with an equal share of processor edits (7 each), using workflow nudges to shape an already-competent coder; GPT-5.4 leans hardest on prompt (8 ships) and uses config (4) to revert a harmful nudge and restructure its strategy phases; Qwen3.5 spreads its few ships across prompt, processor, and config (6/3/3). The shared logic is prompt-first, with structural levers recruited as the base model weakens. 逐模型演化逻辑。图(b)显示，对每个模型而言，SWE-bench 都是先提示词( prompt-first )；次要杠杆则用于跟踪基础模型的强弱。三次运行都完全不进行工具编辑：与 GAIA 不同，失败集合没有任何“机械检索”类簇，工具无法将其关闭。Sonnet 将提示词与等量的处理器编辑配对（各 7 次），通过流程层面的提示来塑造一个本就较为胜任的编码者；GPT-5.4 则最依赖提示词（8 次），并使用配置（4 次）来撤销有害提示并重构其策略阶段；Qwen3.5 将少量运行分散到提示词、处理器与配置（6/3/3）。共享逻辑始终是提示词优先：随着基础模型变弱，结构性杠杆才被逐步纳入。

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              Did evolution close the clusters? Panel (c) reveals a sharp capability floor. For the strong models the productive levers genuinely close failures: GPT-5.4's config edits reach 0.48 and prompt 0.39, while Sonnet's prompt and processor levers both land at 0.40. For Qwen3.5-9B every lever collapses to near-zero (prompt 0.05, config 0.05, processor 0.06 ), an order of magnitude lower, because the 9B base cannot execute the predicted fixes. The same loop that lifts GPT-5.4 from 45% to a 64% peak and stabilizes Sonnet near 87% yields only noise on Qwen3.5 (peak 42%, zero durable gains). Overall SWE-bench improves through prompt edits that broaden fix scope and config edits that restore workflow pacing, but only for models strong enough to act on them. 演化能否关闭这些簇？图(c)揭示了鲜明的能力下限。对于强模型，真正的有效杠杆确实能够关闭失败：GPT-5.4 的配置编辑达到 0.48、提示词达到 0.39；而 Sonnet 的提示词与处理器杠杆都落在 0.40。对 Qwen3.5-9B，所有杠杆都崩塌到接近零（提示词 0.05、配置 0.05、处理器 0.06），低了一个数量级，因为 9B 基础模型无法执行预期的修复。用于将 GPT-5.4 从 45% 拉升到峰值 64% 并使 Sonnet 稳定在约 87% 的同一循环，在 Qwen3.5 上只产生噪声（峰值 42%，没有持久增益）。总体而言，SWE-bench 的提升来自提示词编辑：扩大修复范围；以及配置编辑：恢复工作流节奏，但仅适用于足够强、能够真正执行这些杠杆的模型。

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                               

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              Figure 12 SWE-bench Verified evolution analysis (55 tasks, resolved-rate). (a) Failure clusters pooled across all rounds and all three task models; incomplete fix and wrong diagnosis dominate, while the mechanical tail (no-edit, anchor mismatch, budget) is residual; failures are under-fixes, not gamed evaluations. (b) Lever mix by model: every run is prompt-first and ships zero tools edits, with the secondary lever shifting from processor (Sonnet) to config (GPT-5.4) to a varied mix (Qwen3.5). (c) Lever effectiveness as hit-rate (tasks flipped / predicted); strong models reach 0.39-0.48 on their productive levers,whereas every Qwen3.5-9B lever collapses to ≈0.05 ,a capability floor below which evolution cannot compound. 图 12 SWE-bench Verified 演化分析（55 个任务，resolved-rate）。(a) 将所有轮次与三个任务模型汇聚后的失败簇：未完成修复与错误诊断占主导，而机械长尾（不编辑、锚点不匹配、预算）只是残余；失败是未完成修复，而非被“玩弄”的评测。(b) 各模型的杠杆组合：每次运行都以提示词优先，并且零工具编辑；次要杠杆从处理器（Sonnet）转向配置（GPT-5.4），再在 Qwen3.5 上变为混合。(c) 杠杆有效性以命中率衡量（被翻转的任务/预测的任务）；强模型在其有效杠杆上达到 0.39-0.48，而每个 Qwen3.5-9B 的杠杆都坍塌为 ≈0.05 ，即演化无法进一步累积的能力下限之下。

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              E Reproducibility and Artifacts

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              E 可复现性与产物

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              E.1 Per-Run Directory Layout

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              E.1 每轮目录布局

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              Each evolution run writes a self-describing directory. The layout below lets a reader reconstruct any decision in this paper from the logged artifacts. 每次进化运行都会写入一个自描述目录。下列布局使读者能够根据记录的工件重建本文中的任何决策。

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              runs/<run_name>/ (per-run artifact layout) runs/<run_name>/（每轮工件布局）

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                               

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              runs/<run_name>/ runs/<run_name>/

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              |-- INDEX.md # # human-readable index of the run |-- INDEX.md # # 该运行的人类可读索引

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              |-- journal.md # first-person memo, one entry per round |-- journal.md # 第一人称备忘录，每轮一条记录

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              |-- curves.json # per-round pass-rate trajectory |-- curves.json # 每轮通过率轨迹

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              |-- scoreboard.json # ships + per-bucket reputation |-- scoreboard.json # 船只 + 各桶声誉

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              |-- audit.jsonl # structured event log (stage / gate / commit) |-- audit.jsonl # 结构化事件日志（阶段 / 门控 / 提交）

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              |-- data/ |-- data/

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              || |-- task_history.jsonl # one line per (round, task) || |-- task_history.jsonl # 每行对应一个（轮次，任务）

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              || |-- ship_outcomes.json # one entry per historical ship || |-- ship_outcomes.json # 每个历史船只一条记录

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              | -- rejected_candidates.jsonl |-- rejected_candidates.jsonl

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              -- R<n>/ #per-round artifacts-- R/ #每轮工件

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  |-- landscape.md #Planner cross-trace synthesis     |-- landscape.md #规划器交叉轨迹综合

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  |-- candidates/C-R-NN.md # Evolver change manifests (K per round)     |-- candidates/C-R-NN.md # 演化器变更清单（每轮 K 个）

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  |-- applied/C-R-NN/ # applied config + asset files     |-- applied/C-R-NN/ # 应用配置 + 资源文件

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  1- decision.md #Critic ship / no_op decision     1- decision.md #Critic 船 / no_op 决策

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  |-- verdicts/V-C-R-NN.md     |-- verdicts/V-C-R-NN.md

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  |-- regressions.md #tasks worsened vs R     |-- regressions.md #相较于 R，任务变差

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  1- digests/.md #per-task failure analysis     1- digests/.md #按任务的失败分析

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              回到顶部（T）
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              链接样式：原文
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              复制为：URL
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              展开全部（E）
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              收起全部（R）
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              帮助 / 快捷键（H）
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              隐藏注释（C）
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              复制图片链接
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              复制为：URL

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              ✕
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              ✕

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              快速帮助

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              当前模式

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              链接样式：—

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              复制为：—

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              常用操作

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              # 图标：复制段落链接 / 片段

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              收起/展开大纲：O；回到顶部：T

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              显示/隐藏注释：C

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              链接样式

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              • 原文：#段落（Alt+1）
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              • %编码：#%E6%AE%B5%E8%90%BD（Alt+2）
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              • 富文本片段（HTML 片段）（Alt+3）
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              • 循环切换：U

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              复制格式（仅“原文 / %编码”可用）

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              • 设为 URL：Alt+U
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              • 设为 Markdown：Alt+M
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              • 二者切换：M

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              大纲与导航

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              • 展开全部：E；收起全部：R
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              • 滚动时自动高亮并展开对应大纲分支
